questions: How do SG patterns close today, and where is enforcer existence verified?
What share of the countermeasure corpus already cites executable enforcement?
What is the smallest enforcement seam and the backfill burden?

findings.claim: addressed/addressed_reason carry no enforcer field; remediated conflates executable closure with operator fiat
mark_addressed stage 2 verifies audit PASS but never that an enforcer exists
32 of 40 SG entries cite executable enforcers by convention; 8 prose-only; convention is unenforced
Structured log has 0 closed events of 3; grandfathering costs nothing; lint findings double as the backfill worklist
